LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MICHAEL NOLAN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA MN CONSTRUCTION'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING LEAVE TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THE PROPOSED AMENDMENT WOULD SIGNIFICANTLY EXPAND THE ISSUES ON THE EVE OF TRIAL WITHOUT GIVING DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO TEST AMENDMENT BY DEMURRER OR MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189 301/PJB

calendar.matters:
Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on cross-complainant Todd Horton's motion to tax costs.
Dept. 611, Judge: James J. McBride, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Joe Vickstein, CSR #4780.

Edward Haas, Esq. appeared for cross-complainant Todd Horton.
Ruben Sundeen appeared for cross-defendant Gregory Hamel.

After hearing argument by counsel, and good cause appearing, the Court rules as follows: Cross-defendant Hamel's Memorandum of Costs seeking $502.09 was unopposed and is GRANTED. Furthermore, Cross-complainant Todd Horton shall pay Cross-complainant costs in the amount of $2,052.25.

Counsel for Gregory Hamel shall prepare the Order After Hearing.

Notice Of Motion For Order Granting Leave To File A First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT MICHAEL NOLAN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA MN CONSTRUCTION'S Motion For Order Granting Leave To File A First Amended Complaint IS DENIED. THE PROPOSED AMENDMENT WOULD SIGNIFICANTLY EXPAND THE ISSUES ON THE EVE OF TRIAL WITHOUT GIVING DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO TEST AMENDMENT BY DEMURRER OR MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
